name: In Houston, are AI prompts protected from discovery in family court?

mainEntity.name: In Houston, are AI prompts protected from discovery in family court?

acceptedAnswer.description: Generally discoverable if relevant; no automatic privilege for AI unlike attorney work product.[4][5] Texas courts follow similar rules.[4] Key factors: Case relevance; overbreadth objections; protective orders. Assert privilege narrowly; get lawyer advice. Minimize sensitive inputs.
